name: stepper
title: Stepper
author: Parable
description: A horizontal or vertical progress stepper: numbered circles connect via a track whose accent fill grows across completed segments, the current step pulses inside a solid accent ring, and passing onStepClick turns completed/current steps into keyboard-operable buttons (upcoming steps stay inert). Under prefers-reduced-motion the connector fills snap in with no grow and the pulse is suppressed, leaving a static, legible ring.
